title: UTV2-586: Runtime burn-in proof window — live MLB/NHL/NBA pipeline

UTV2-606.fix: SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED threaded through AppEnv — board-scan gate now receives config value instead of reading process.env directly

UTV2-644.fix: modelRegistry + experimentLedger added to createDatabaseRepositoryBundle — candidate-scoring was silently returning null for every champion lookup

UTV2-645.fix: DatabaseMarketUniverseRepository.findByIds chunked to 100 per request — 2133 UUIDs in single IN clause exceeded Node.js fetch URL limits

UTV2-646.fix: board-pick-writer metadata.promotionScores.edge set using domain-analysis-compatible formula clamp(50 + (model_score-0.5)*400, 0, 100) — board picks were suppressed because domain analysis computed negative confidence-delta edge

UTV2-647.fix: 'board-construction' added to LIVE_SOURCES in distribution-worker — all board picks were dead-lettered immediately with proof-pick-blocked

UTV2-648.fix: AbortController signal added to Discord delivery fetch with 25s timeout — fetch was hanging indefinitely, bypassing watchdog recovery

UTV2-649.fix: attempt_count included in distribution-process system_run idempotency key — retry attempts after 40+ stale reaps hit duplicate key constraint on startup

provider_offers.evidence: system-pick-scanner: scan.completed scanned=100 materialized=83; market-universe-materializer: offersRead=1000 upserted=446

market_universe.evidence: 431-446 markets across NBA/NHL/MLB updated every 5-min cycle; refreshed_at within 1 minute

pick_candidates.evidence: board-scan: scanned=1000 qualified=329-358 per cycle; total 2434 candidates in DB

candidate_scoring.evidence: ranked-selection: ranked=744; no_unscored_candidates on startup. model_score range [0.45, 0.88] across 760 scored candidates

syndicate_board.evidence: board-construction: boardSize=18 boardRunId=03ff7ca8; 726 entries in syndicate_board. Board tiers: A+(6) A(4) B(8). Model scores: A+ tier 0.857-0.880, B tier bottom 0.572

picks_created.evidence: board-pick-writer: 11 picks created from board run 03ff7ca8. 9/11 picks qualified (promotion_score 77-87, targeting best-bets and trader-insights). 2/11 correctly suppressed (model_score 0.57-0.58, score 67-69, below 70 threshold)

distribution_outbox.evidence: 9 outbox entries created: 4 targeting discord:best-bets, 5 targeting discord:trader-insights. All 4 best-bets entries transitioned to status=sent (attempt_count=41-42)

distribution_receipts.evidence: 4 live Discord receipts confirmed: receipt_type=discord.message, status=sent, dryRun=false, channelId=1296531122234327100. Discord messageIds: 1494128900039770132, 1494128903210663957, 1494128905567735961, 1494129256371064852. Recorded at 2026-04-16T00:14:49Z – 2026-04-16T00:16:14Z. Source=board-construction on all 4.

gaps_discovered.description: modelRegistry absent from repository bundle — all candidates skipped with no_champion_skip
board-pick-writer picks suppressed — domain analysis computed negative edge for board picks, overriding model_score. Fixed by setting promotionScores.edge = clamp(50+(model_score-0.5)*400, 0, 100)
LIVE_SOURCES in distribution-worker did not include 'board-construction' — all board picks dead-lettered with proof-pick-blocked
Discord delivery fetch had no AbortController signal — hung indefinitely when Discord API was slow, bypassing watchdog recovery. Delivery cycled processing→stale-reap every 5 min.

gaps_discovered.severity: blocking for worker restart after high attempt_count
gaps_discovered.description: distribution-process system_run idempotency key lacked attempt_count — after 40+ stale reaps, worker crashed on startup with duplicate key constraint violation on every claim attempt.

verdict: COMPLETE (8/8 stages) — full autonomous pick pipeline proven end-to-end. 4 live Discord receipts from board-construction source to discord:best-bets channel, dryRun=false, real Discord message IDs confirmed. Pipeline: offers → market_universe → candidates → scoring → board → picks → outbox → receipts. 7 prerequisite fixes merged during burn-in window.
